bugs.error_message: 'Label' is defined but never used. @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
bugs.root_cause: Type dedup refactor imported extra shared types into main process that were not referenced.
bugs.fix: Removed unused type imports and cleaned extra newline in renderer types to satisfy lint/prettier.

bugs.error_message: TS2440: Import declaration conflicts with local declaration of 'DEFAULT_UI_SCALE'.
bugs.root_cause: Shared defaults refactor imported DEFAULT_UI_SCALE while old local constant remained.
bugs.fix: Removed local DEFAULT_UI_SCALE constant and kept shared import from src/shared/defaults.ts.

bugs.error_message: TS2322 in useAppStore persisted patch assignment: Type ... is not assignable to type 'undefined'.
bugs.root_cause: Indexed assignment to Partial<PersistedSlice> via union key was too narrow for TypeScript.
bugs.fix: Switched patch assignment to a generic record cast in the diff loop and revalidated build.

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-xl b
bugs.fix: Changed to `flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden bg-app-title

bugs.error_message: Wykres po dodaniu kolejnych leków tylko się sumuje; peak jest zbyt ostry i spadek zbyt krótki.
bugs.root_cause: Generator wykresu sumował surowe krzywe dawek liniowo bez kształtowania odpowiedzi układu, więc kumulacja dawała ostre szczyty i zbyt szybki zjazd.
bugs.fix: Dodano smoothSummedEffect (asymetryczny filtr: szybszy wzrost, wolniejszy spadek) i przełączono slope/band/crash na krzywą wygładzoną.

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 4 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 14→11 lines (4 removed)

bugs.error_message: Kanban task card height snaps to a fixed size during drag-and-drop instead of preserving each card's natural height.
bugs.root_cause: Drag overlay used a different preview shell than the sortable card and only preserved width, so overlay height was recalculated instead of matching the source card.
bugs.fix: Captured both width and height from the dragged element's initial rect and reused the exact same card shell classes in `KanbanCardPreview` as in `SortableCard`.

bugs.error_message: Dragging task into another kanban section shows no live drop preview and often inserts near the top instead of where the card is released.
bugs.root_cause: Board computed cross-column reorder only on drop, so target `SortableContext` never received temporary item positions during hover. Without live draft order, collision often resolved against early items and insertion index skewed toward the top.
bugs.fix: Added draft column task ids updated in `onDragOver`, rendered columns from that draft during drag, and computed insert-before/after using hovered card midpoint so cross-column preview and final drop position match pointer location.

bugs.error_message: Node test runtime failed to load `better-sqlite3` after Electron rebuild with NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch / module did not self-register.
bugs.root_cause: The native module was rebuilt for Electron's ABI during install, so direct database tests under the plain Node test runner could not load the binary.
bugs.fix: Reworked main storage tests to cover pure SQLite snapshot serialization/deserialization helpers instead of opening the native DB in the Node-based test script.

bugs.error_message: ESLint failed on `src/renderer/src/store/tests/register-aliases.cjs` with `@typescript-eslint/no-require-imports`.
bugs.root_cause: The CommonJS alias bootstrap file uses `require`, but the lint rule also scanned `.cjs` test helpers without a local override.
bugs.fix: Added a targeted ESLint disable comment for `@typescript-eslint/no-require-imports` at the top of the CommonJS helper and formatted the flagged files.

bugs.error_message: SQLite migration created a fresh database but did not import existing `electron-store` data, so existing users would boot into an empty workspace.
bugs.root_cause: The new storage backend initialized only `swag-todo.db` and removed the old dependency without any first-run bridge from the legacy `todoist-clone.json` payload.
bugs.fix: Added legacy-store parsing plus first-run import from the previous electron-store JSON file when creating a new SQLite database.

bugs.error_message: `store:savePartial` reloaded the full SQLite snapshot before every patch and `uiScale` lookup read the entire state just to fetch one setting.
bugs.root_cause: Main-process SQLite storage had no in-memory state cache, so partial updates and simple lookups paid a redundant full-database read cost before the inevitable full snapshot rewrite.
bugs.fix: Introduced a normalized in-memory cache, dedicated `loadUiScale()`, and prepared read/write closures so partial saves merge in memory and avoid unnecessary DB roundtrips.

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Type error
bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect type annotation
bugs.fix: Added type assertion/annotation

bugs.error_message: SQLite storage doing full DELETE+INSERT on every save — performance bottleneck
bugs.root_cause: writeSnapshotTx cleared all tables then re-inserted entire app state on every saveState/savePartial call
bugs.fix: Replaced writeSnapshotTx with writeDeltaTx: changedTaskIds() diffs prev/next snapshots, only changed tasks get UPSERT, child tables rebuilt per changed task_id, other collections use INSERT OR REPLACE + DELETE WHERE id NOT IN. writeSnapshotTx kept for legacy migration path only.

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 64 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 68→3 lines (64 removed)

bugs.error_message: Missing guard clause
bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: prevTaskJson.get(t.id
bugs.fix: Added guard clause: if (prevTaskJson.get(t.id)

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Type error
bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect type annotation
bugs.fix: Added type assertion/annotation

bugs.error_message: Performance: changedTaskIds used Array.find in O(n²) loop for deleted-task detection; writeState serialized cachedState on every save (1 extra full serialization); non-task collections upserted unconditionally on every writeDeltaTx call
bugs.root_cause: 1) Array.find inside for-loop = O(n²) for removed-task detection. 2) No snapshot cache — prev snapshot re-serialized from cachedState each write. 3) projects/sessions/labels/timeBlocks/medications always upserted even when unchanged
bugs.fix: 1) Built Set<string> from next.tasks before removed-task loop. 2) Added cachedSnapshot field, updated in writeState, used as prev in writeDeltaTx. 3) Added changedIds() helper, wrapped non-task collection upserts in if(changedIds(...)) guard

bugs.error_message: Performance: mergeAppState called normalizeAppState unconditionally — iterates all tasks on every savePartial even for non-task patches like isSidebarCollapsed
bugs.root_cause: normalizeAppState mapped all tasks through normalizeTask on every merge regardless of which fields changed
bugs.fix: Conditionally skip normalizeAppState when patch.tasks is undefined; only normalize when tasks field is present in the patch

bugs.error_message: Security: IPC store:save / store:savePartial accepted arrays without validating element IDs — malicious renderer payload could inject arbitrary id strings
bugs.root_cause: isAppState and isAppStatePatch only checked that fields were arrays, not that array elements had valid UUID-format ids
bugs.fix: Added UUID_RE + isSafeId + allHaveSafeIds helpers; isAppState and isAppStatePatch now reject payloads where any entity id fails UUID format check

bugs.error_message: Wrong operator: ?? should be !==
bugs.root_cause: Used "??" instead of "!=="
bugs.fix: Changed operator ?? → !==

bugs.error_message: Aplikacja od razu wywala się przy globalnym runtime error zamiast pokazać fallback i zostać otwarta.
bugs.root_cause: Brak globalnych handlerów dla `uncaughtException` / `unhandledRejection` w main oraz brak renderer boundary na poziomie root dla błędów React/window/promise.
bugs.fix: Dodałem globalne handlery procesu w Electron main z `dialog.showErrorBox` oraz renderer `GlobalErrorBoundary` łapiący React errors, `window.error` i `unhandledrejection`, z fallback UI i reloadem.

bugs.error_message: Global error boundary łapał też `window.error` z błędów ładowania assetów, więc pojedynczy font/img/script mógł zrzucić cały app do fallback screena.
bugs.root_cause: Handler `window.addEventListener('error')` traktował każdy `ErrorEvent` jak runtime JS error i nie odróżniał resource-load failures od błędów wykonywania kodu.
bugs.fix: Dodałem filtr `event.target !== window`, więc boundary ignoruje błędy ładowania zasobów i reaguje tylko na real runtime faults.

bugs.error_message: `bun run lint` dawał fałszywe prettier warningi przez przestarzały ESLint cache mimo że pliki były już sformatowane poprawnie.
bugs.root_cause: Skrypt lint używał `eslint --cache .`, a cache nie był spójny po `prettier --write`, więc workflow raportował nieistniejące problemy.
bugs.fix: Zmieniłem skrypt lint na `eslint .` bez cache, żeby wynik był deterministyczny i zgodny ze stanem plików.

bugs.error_message: Node test runtime zgłaszał `window is not defined` po włączeniu automatycznej hydracji Zustand store przy imporcie renderer store.
bugs.root_cause: Persist middleware auto-uruchamiał `rehydrate()` także w środowisku Node, gdzie `persistedStorage.getItem()` dotyka `window.api` i kończy się unhandled rejection.
bugs.fix: Dodałem `skipHydration: typeof window === 'undefined'` dla store domenowego i zostawiłem automatyczną hydrację tylko w rendererze przeglądarkowym.

bugs.error_message: openwolf designqc failed to capture mobile route: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:5173/
bugs.root_cause: Dev server connection dropped during mobile screenshot capture, so only desktop screenshot completed.
bugs.fix: Reran designqc after theme tweak; desktop capture succeeded, mobile capture still needs a stable dev-server connection.

bugs.error_message: Zmodyfikowane theme nie zapisują się między przełączaniem na inne theme; po restarcie aplikacji obecny stan się zapisuje.
bugs.root_cause: Appearance state trzymał tylko jeden globalny `customTokens` map i `setThemeId()` zerował go przy każdej zmianie theme, więc customizacje znikały przy przełączaniu presetów.
bugs.fix: Dodałem `customTokensByTheme`, migrację legacy payloadu do aktywnego bucketu, przełączanie theme z przywracaniem bucketu danego presetu oraz testy store/persist/SQLite dla tego przepływu.

bugs.error_message: W InboxPage kliknięcie checkboxa od razu usuwa task z listy, zamiast poczekać aż skończy się animacja checkboxa i confetti.
bugs.root_cause: Flow completion przełączał `task.completed` natychmiast w store, a Inbox filtruje aktywne taski bezpośrednio po tym polu, więc wiersz znikał zanim UI skończyło animację.
bugs.fix: Dodałem opóźnione `toggleTaskComplete` z natychmiastowym confetti, lokalny stan `isCompleting`/`isFadingOut` w `TaskRow` oraz włączyłem ten tryb dla `InboxPage`, żeby task znikał dopiero po animacji z fade-outem.

bugs.error_message: Na jasnych themach ikony Activity (Completed, edited, created) oraz pomocnicze linie/bandy wykresu HealthPage są słabo widoczne przez zbyt jasne kolory i przezroczystość.
bugs.root_cause: Theme presets nie miały klasyfikacji light/dark, więc Activity i HealthPage używały tych samych transparentnych kolorów dla wszystkich motywów.
bugs.fix: Dodałem `ThemeTone`, klasy root `app-theme-light/dark`, mocniejsze light warianty ikon Activity oraz tone-aware CSS vars dla pomocniczych elementów wykresu HealthPage; po feedbacku podbiłem light chart opacity/darkness oraz grubość linii.

bugs.error_message: Komponent due date w context menu po kliknięciu pokazuje się w niewłaściwym miejscu i przy ruchu myszką poza context znika.
bugs.root_cause: Due date używał osobnego Popover z ukrytym `sr-only` triggerem poza ContextMenu.Content, więc pozycjonowanie było względem złego elementu, a interakcja z menu zamykała/rozłączała popover.
bugs.fix: Zastąpiłem Popover komponentem `ContextMenu.SubContent` z kalendarzem, więc pozycjonowanie jest zakotwiczone w pozycji `Due Date`, a ruch myszy zostaje w jednym Radix menu tree.

bugs.error_message: Delete item w task context menu ma za słaby kontrast hovera i koloru tekstu na jasnych themach.
bugs.root_cause: Delete item używał tylko ciemnothemowych klas `text-red-300` / `hover:text-red-200`, które na jasnym tle są zbyt blade.
bugs.fix: Dodałem `.app-theme-light` warianty: `text-red-800`, mocniejszy hover background `bg-red-700/15` i hover text `text-red-950`.

bugs.error_message: Komponent due date buguje się: ring kliknięcia działa na właściwym dniu, ale wybiera się lewa data obok.
bugs.root_cause: `handleDaySelect` zapisywał datę przez `toISOString().slice(0, 10)`, więc lokalna północ w strefach z dodatnim offsetem UTC serializowała się jako poprzedni dzień.
bugs.fix: Zmieniono zapis due date na lokalne `format(day, 'yyyy-MM-dd')` i odczyt selected date na `parseISO(task.dueDate)`.

bugs.error_message: tsc errors after coss registry install: generated components imported local `src/renderer/src/components/ui/*` instead of Base UI namespaces.
bugs.root_cause: The shadcn/coss registry resolved primitive imports through the project's local aliases, producing self-imports and stale local dialog/drawer/otp mappings.
bugs.fix: Rewrote generated primitive imports to `@base-ui/react/*`, local component imports to `@renderer/components/ui/*`, and cn imports to `@renderer/utils/cn`.

bugs.error_message: bun run format failed with EROFS writing `.agents/skills/coss-*` files.
bugs.root_cause: Repo-wide Prettier traversed local read-only skill directories mounted under the workspace.
bugs.fix: Added `.agents`, `.claude/skills`, and `.pi` to `.prettierignore`, then reran `bun run format` successfully.

bugs.error_message: bun run lint failed: React purity rule rejected `Math.random()` inside coss `SidebarMenuSkeleton` render.
bugs.root_cause: Generated coss sidebar skeleton computed a random width during render via `Math.random()`.
bugs.fix: Replaced the random skeleton width with deterministic widths based on whether the skeleton includes an icon.

bugs.error_message: SearchSortBar filter popover flashes briefly in the top-right corner and disappears.
bugs.root_cause: The coss PopoverTrigger rendered through the local Button component, which does not forward a DOM ref for Base UI to anchor the popover positioner reliably.
bugs.fix: Changed the popover trigger render target to a native button styled with `buttonVariants`, preserving the same appearance while giving Base UI a real DOM anchor.

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: SheetFooter should be DialogFooter
bugs.root_cause: Used "SheetFooter" instead of "DialogFooter"
bugs.fix: Changed SheetFooter → DialogFooter

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had 'relative row-start-2 flex max-h-full min-h-0 w-fu
bugs.fix: Changed to 'relative row-start-2 flex max-h-full min-h-0 w-fu

bugs.error_message: CSS fix: not-dark
bugs.root_cause: not-dark: bg-clip-padding text-app-text opacity-[calc(1-var(--nested-dialogs))] → bg-clip-padding text-popover-foreground opacity-[calc(1-var(--nested-dialogs))]
bugs.fix: Changed not-dark: bg-clip-padding text-app-text opacity-[calc(1-var(--nested-dialogs))] → bg-clip-padding text-popover-foreground opacity-[calc(1-var(--nested-dialogs))]

bugs.error_message: Background blur covers the whole app including the title bar; it should only cover sidebar plus content.
bugs.root_cause: Dialog backdrop and viewport used `fixed inset-0`, so the Base UI overlay covered the custom Electron title bar as well as the app body.
bugs.fix: Constrained dialog backdrop and viewport with `top-[var(--app-overlay-top,1.75rem)]`, and set `--app-overlay-top` from `App.tsx` so fullscreen can use `0px`.

bugs.error_message: bun run build failed: SearchSortBar.tsx declared `Filter`, `FilterX`, and `Funnel` but never used them.
bugs.root_cause: Stale lucide icon imports remained after the filter button implementation changed.
bugs.fix: Removed the unused icon imports, leaving only `ListFilter`, `Plus`, and `Search`; `bun run build` then passed.

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had '3rem'
bugs.fix: Changed to '56px'

bugs.error_message: Type error
bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect type annotation
bugs.fix: Added type assertion/annotation

bugs.error_message: CSS fix: sm
bugs.root_cause: sm: grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_13.5rem]"> → grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_auto_13.5rem]">
bugs.fix: Changed sm: grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_13.5rem]"> → grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_auto_13.5rem]">

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 3 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 21→11 lines (3 removed)

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had 'flex h-8 cursor-default select-none items-center
bugs.fix: Changed to 'flex h-8 cursor-default select-none items-center

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 4 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 6→3 lines (4 removed)

bugs.error_message: AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Expected values to be strictly deep-equal in persistedStorage reload test
bugs.root_cause: The test compared a raw task fixture against stateFromPersisted output, but persistence normalization adds optional task fields with undefined values.
bugs.fix: Changed the reload test to assert stable persisted fields (length, id, title) instead of raw object equality.

bugs.error_message: Error: Cannot find module '/home/fenta/Projects/SwagTodo/src/renderer/src/components/ui/toast'
bugs.root_cause: The Node test runner resolved a static alias import to a TSX component path without bundler extension resolution.
bugs.fix: Split Base UI toast manager singletons into src/renderer/src/components/ui/toast-manager.ts and imported that TS module from the persistence adapter.

bugs.error_message: TS2345: Type 'number' is not assignable to type '100 | 110 | 125 | 150 | 175'.
bugs.root_cause: A reusable test storage value widened uiScale from literal 125 to number.
bugs.fix: Pinned uiScale and version as const literals in the test value.

bugs.error_message: TS2724: '../storage/sqlite' has no exported member named 'changedTaskChildIds'; TS2304: Cannot find name 'UiScale'.
bugs.root_cause: New SQLite child-diff helper was not re-exported from the storage barrel, and re-exporting UiScale from defaults did not create a local type binding for AppState.
bugs.fix: Re-exported changedTaskChildIds from src/main/storage/sqlite.ts and imported UiScale as a type before re-exporting it from src/shared/types.ts.

bugs.error_message: react-hooks/set-state-in-effect in TaskEditPanel; @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars for PX_PER_MIN.
bugs.root_cause: Task switch reset used synchronous setState inside an effect, and CALENDAR_PX_PER_MIN removal left PX_PER_MIN imported only for the removed export.
bugs.fix: Keyed TaskEditPanel by task id so cleanup flushes pending commits on remount, removed the reset effect, and removed the unused PX_PER_MIN import.

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "flex items-start items-center gap-2"
bugs.fix: Changed to "flex items-center gap-2"

bugs.error_message: biome formatter failed on SearchSortBar.tsx after adding priority dot markup
bugs.root_cause: Inline priority dot JSX in SelectItem needed formatter-friendly wrapping after the new span was added.
bugs.fix: Reformatted the priority option render block with Biome so lint passed.

bugs.error_message: Select item checkmark displays at start instead of far right end.
bugs.root_cause: Default SelectItem grid reserved the first column for ItemIndicator and placed text in the second column.
bugs.fix: Changed SelectItem grid to text-first and indicator-second, with ItemIndicator justified to the end.

bugs.error_message: Select item checkmark right alignment pushes item text to the next line.
bugs.root_cause: Grid children used explicit columns but no explicit row, so auto-placement put ItemText on the next grid row after ItemIndicator.
bugs.fix: Pinned ItemIndicator and ItemText to row-start-1 so text and checkmark share one row.

bugs.error_message: bun install failed with: error: Unexpected accessing temporary directory. Please set $BUN_TMPDIR or $BUN_INSTALL
bugs.root_cause: Sandboxed command environment prevented Bun from accessing its temporary install directory.
bugs.fix: Reran `env BUN_TMPDIR=/tmp bun install` with escalated permissions so Bun could update the lockfile and rebuild native app deps.

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "group flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-3.5 ro
bugs.fix: Changed to "group relative flex cursor-pointer items-center g

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "rounded-lg"
bugs.fix: Changed to "rounded-md"

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "h-8 px-2 text-sm text-app-text-secondary hover:bg
bugs.fix: Changed to "h-8 px-2 text-sm transition-colors duration-150 t

bugs.error_message: Windows app icon did not work; manual icon picker only accepts .ico while source asset was a PNG.
bugs.root_cause: The Windows .ico resource only contained 16x16 and 32x32 images, so Windows shell/installer contexts could miss suitable icon resolutions.
bugs.fix: Regenerated build/icon.ico from build/icon.png with 256, 128, 64, 48, 32, and 16 pixel sizes.

bugs.error_message: electron-builder --win --dir failed on Linux with: wine is required
bugs.root_cause: Cross-building a Windows Electron executable from Linux requires wine for executable resource updates.
bugs.fix: Regenerated and validated the ICO locally, then noted that full Windows packaging verification must run on Windows or Linux with wine installed.

bugs.error_message: jq: command not found
bugs.root_cause: The local environment does not have jq installed for JSON validation.
bugs.fix: Validated .wolf/buglog.json with Node JSON.parse instead.

bugs.error_message: Przy wąskim viewport w sekcji Activity nazwa aktywności może skurczyć tytuł taska do jednej litery.
bugs.root_cause: Activity row used fixed grid columns for verb, project, and time, leaving the task title column with almost no space on narrow viewports.
bugs.fix: Added a narrow-viewport grid layout that moves the task title and project text onto their own rows with min-w-0 truncation, while preserving the wider table layout at sm/md breakpoints.

bugs.error_message: Activity project column is too large/fixed and the table should not horizontally scroll on small viewport; elapsed activity time can be omitted.
bugs.root_cause: The Activity row still reserved fixed-width columns for project and relative time on wider breakpoints, which made the layout less adaptive and increased overflow pressure.
bugs.fix: Removed the relative time column and replaced fixed project/time grid tracks with adaptive minmax/fraction tracks so title and project share available width dynamically.
